companyName: Beijing TSD Semiconductor Equipment Co., Ltd.
companyNameJapanese: 北京特思迪半導体設備有限公司
description: Chinese specialist in ultra-precision surface processing equipment for semiconductors. Core products: CMP polishing machines, wafer thinning/back-grinding machines, double-side grinding/lapping machines. Focused on compound semiconductor (SiC, GaN) substrates, wafer manufacturing, semiconductor devices, advanced packaging, and MEMS. #1 domestic market share in compound semiconductor CMP equipment. Only Chinese company with volume production of compound semiconductor-specific thinning, polishing, and CMP equipment. 170+ patents. National High-Tech Enterprise, Zhongguancun High-Tech.

competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - CMP and grinding/polishing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Private company (Beijing-based startup). Designated as a 'Chinese Potential Unicorn Enterprise'. Specializes in compound semiconductor (SiC/GaN) surface processing where ACCRETECH also competes with its polish grinders and CMP equipment. While Huahai Qingke dominates silicon CMP, TSD leads in compound semiconductor CMP domestically. Key technology differentiator: specialized for harder-to-process SiC and GaN materials. Postdoctoral research station. Competes with ACCRETECH's edge grinder and polish grinder product lines.

_metadata.dataSource: Company website, OFweek, industry reports, Chinese language sources
